message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 232 migrate 6 wezterm direct-call sites (wait-for + workflow-run RPC + doctor) to cx-first (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Continues tick 230/231's wezterm surface migration. Six more sites:

1. L17532 robot wait-for pane-existence check:
   `wezterm.list_panes_with_cx(&cx)`
2. L19242 RPC workflow-run dry-run pane lookup:
   `wezterm.get_pane_with_cx(&cx, pane_id)`
3. L19261 RPC workflow-run pane verification:
   `wezterm.list_panes_with_cx(&cx)`
4. L21176 doctor agents-running (configured wezterm):
   `wezterm.list_panes_with_cx(&cx)` (one of two identical sites —
   replace_all used)
5. L21232 doctor panes-listing (configured wezterm):
   `wezterm.list_panes_with_cx(&cx)`
6. L21292 doctor agents detect-summary (second identical site
   caught by replace_all with L21176)

Standard `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` pattern.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Progress: 16/28 wezterm sites migrated (57%).

Remaining 12 sites across:
- Workflow-start CLI (L23899)
- Human send / commit (L24143, L24180, L24278, L24328, L24618,
  L26434, L26984, L24700, L24726)
- Workspace restore list (L25297)
- Cross-boundary status helper (L35457)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
